evals.name: harris-free-will
evals.prompt: Humanise the following essay about free will and moral responsibility.
evals.expected_output: Text that reads like a thoughtful philosophical essay with personal voice, varied sentence rhythm, and no AI tells

assertions.name: no-ai-vocabulary-clustering
assertions.description: No paragraph with 3+ AI vocabulary words

assertions.name: no-markdown-headings
assertions.description: No markdown heading syntax in prose

assertions.name: meaning-preservation
assertions.description: Covers free will objection, good/evil distinction, surgeon example, lack of ultimate control over desires

assertions.name: voice-naturalness
assertions.description: Reads as though a specific human wrote it, not a generic overview. Has opinions, acknowledges uncertainty, or uses first person where appropriate

evals.name: murray-doctors-die
evals.prompt: Humanise the following essay about how doctors approach their own end-of-life care.
evals.expected_output: Text that reads like a personal medical essay with storytelling, direct observations, and no AI tells

assertions.name: no-ai-vocabulary-clustering
assertions.description: No paragraph with 3+ AI vocabulary words

assertions.name: no-markdown-headings
assertions.description: No markdown heading syntax in prose

assertions.name: meaning-preservation
assertions.description: Covers Charlie's anecdote, doctors choosing less treatment, knowledge of medicine's limits, fear of dying in pain/alone

assertions.name: voice-naturalness
assertions.description: Reads like personal medical essay, not a health article overview

evals.name: woolf-moth
evals.prompt: Humanise the following descriptive essay about watching a moth at a window.
evals.expected_output: Text that reads like literary observation with sensory detail and natural rhythm, not a nature article

assertions.name: no-ai-vocabulary-clustering
assertions.description: No paragraph with 3+ AI vocabulary words

assertions.name: no-markdown-headings
assertions.description: No markdown heading syntax in prose

assertions.name: meaning-preservation
assertions.description: Captures the moth at the window, the September morning, the outdoor energy, the moth as embodiment of life force

assertions.name: literary-quality
assertions.description: Uses concrete sensory detail rather than atmospheric adjectives. Shows rather than tells

evals.name: wong-monkeysphere
evals.prompt: Humanise the following humorous essay about Dunbar's number and the Monkeysphere.
evals.expected_output: Text that retains irreverent humor, specific details (monkey names, pirate costume), and conversational tone without AI patterns

assertions.name: no-ai-vocabulary-clustering
assertions.description: No paragraph with 3+ AI vocabulary words

assertions.name: no-markdown-headings
assertions.description: No markdown heading syntax in prose

assertions.name: humor-preserved
assertions.description: The irreverent, conversational tone survives humanisation. Specific funny details (monkey names, pirate costume, jokes) are intact or replaced with equally specific humor

assertions.name: meaning-preservation
assertions.description: Covers Dunbar's number, the monkey thought experiment, brain-size research, the 150 limit, and why this matters for how we treat strangers

evals.name: orwell-why-write
evals.prompt: Humanise the following autobiographical essay about knowing from childhood you would be a writer.
evals.expected_output: Text that reads like honest autobiography with self-deprecation, specific memories, and direct prose

assertions.name: no-ai-vocabulary-clustering
assertions.description: No paragraph with 3+ AI vocabulary words

assertions.name: no-negative-parallelisms
assertions.description: No 'not just...but' or 'not only...but also' constructions

assertions.name: no-markdown-headings
assertions.description: No markdown heading syntax in prose

assertions.name: meaning-preservation
assertions.description: Covers childhood conviction of being a writer, lonely upbringing, early poems, the continuous mental story/internal narration habit

assertions.name: voice-naturalness
assertions.description: First-person, self-deprecating, honest about failures and limitations. Not a 'journey of self-discovery' narrative

evals.name: essay-libraries
evals.prompt: Humanise the following essay about the importance of public libraries.
evals.expected_output: Text that reads like a thoughtful essay with personal voice and no AI tells

assertions.name: no-ai-vocabulary-clustering
assertions.description: No paragraph with 3+ AI vocabulary words

assertions.name: meaning-preservation
assertions.description: Covers equitable access, combating misinformation, lifelong learning, and social cohesion arguments for libraries

assertions.description: Covers cooking as capability, autonomy, connection, and self-expression

evals.name: listicle-remote
evals.prompt: Humanise the following listicle about remote work transforming the workplace.
evals.expected_output: Text that reads like a natural article rather than a slide deck, with no AI tells

assertions.name: no-ai-vocabulary-clustering
assertions.description: No paragraph with 3+ AI vocabulary words

assertions.name: no-anaphora
assertions.description: No 3+ consecutive sentences starting with same word

assertions.name: meaning-preservation
assertions.description: Covers location-agnostic work, productivity redefinition, and talent strategy shifts

evals.expected_output: Text that reads like a clear, engaging explainer without AI tells

assertions.name: no-ai-vocabulary-clustering

assertions.description: Covers classical bits vs qubits, superposition, and quantum computing applications

evals.name: cover-letter
evals.prompt: Humanise the following cover letter for a senior software engineer position.
evals.expected_output: Text that reads like a genuine personal letter, not a corporate template

assertions.name: no-ai-vocabulary-clustering
assertions.description: No paragraph with 3+ AI vocabulary words

assertions.name: meaning-preservation
assertions.description: Covers experience with scalable systems, leadership, and startup capabilities

assertions.name: voice-naturalness
assertions.description: Reads like a person talking about their work, not a corporate template

evals.name: hotel-description
evals.prompt: Humanise the following boutique hotel product description.
evals.expected_output: Text that reads like genuine copy rather than AI-generated tourism marketing

assertions.name: meaning-preservation
assertions.description: Covers the 18th-century building, heritage preservation, design, and location

evals.name: email-decline
evals.prompt: Humanise the following short email declining a meeting invitation.
evals.expected_output: Text that reads like a natural, brief email

assertions.name: meaning-preservation
assertions.description: Declines the meeting and proposes alternative times

evals.name: passthrough-human
evals.expected_output: Text should be left mostly unchanged since it is already human-written with no AI tells

assertions.name: no-ai-vocabulary-clustering
assertions.description: No paragraph with 3+ AI vocabulary words

assertions.name: passthrough-quality
assertions.description: Output should be minimally changed from input since the input has no AI tells. Named people, specific memories, and personal voice should be preserved intact.
